identity.mission: Create a safe, inviting digital space for parents seeking educational support.

headings.usage: All section titles, hero headlines. Use tight tracking for large sizes.

usage_rules.backgrounds: Use 'background' (Cream) for main areas, 'card' (White) for content blocks.
usage_rules.text: Never use pure black. Use 'foreground' (Deep Navy).
usage_rules.gradients: Avoid harsh gradients. Use soft, sunny transitions if necessary (e.g., Cream to Pale Yellow).

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid for services. Asymmetric 'Tetris' grid for Hero.
layout.containers: Max width 1200px for content, full width for backgrounds.

buttons.animation: Hover: scale-105, active: scale-95. Bouncy transition.

cards.style: White background, rounded-3xl, soft shadow-md. Optional: 'Sticker' effect with 4px white border on colored backgrounds.

dividers.style: Use SVG waves or organic curves between sections. No straight hard lines.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle paper grain or noise overlay (opacity 0.05) to add tactility.
visual_enhancers.decorations: Floating abstract shapes (circles, blobs) in background. Hand-drawn doodles (arrows, stars) near CTAs.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide-react (rounded style) or Phosphor Icons (Duotone). Use 'secondary' color for icons.

media.image_style: Warm lighting, candid moments, natural smiles. Rounded corners (rounded-2xl).

hero_bg.alt: Happy child playing with colorful blocks outdoors

services_memory.alt: Assorted colorful toys for memory gym

about_teacher.alt: Friendly female teacher holding a folder

rules.hover: Playful scale and rotation (rotate-1 or rotate-2) on cards.
rules.hero: Gentle floating animation for background elements (y: [0, -10, 0]).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on colored backgrounds meets AA standard. Use dark text on yellow/orange.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a single-page React app. Use 'react-scroll' for navigation links. Keep the tone warm and inviting.
instructions_to_main_agent.logo: Since no logo is provided, create a text-based logo using the Heading font (Fredoka) with a playful color mix (e.g., 'Uczy' in Primary, 'dełko' in Secondary).
sections: Hero: Emotional headline, CTA 'Umów się na konsultację', happy child image.
Problems: 'Czy Twoje dziecko...' list. Use empathy, not fear.
Services: 4 cards (Math, Reading, Memory, Compensatory). Use icons + images.
About: 'O mnie' - Julia Plichta. Use the teacher placeholder image.
How it works: Simple 3-step process (Contact -> Diagnosis -> Classes).
Testimonials: 3 placeholder quotes from happy parents.
Contact: Form (Name, Phone, Email, Message) + WhatsApp/Phone buttons.
instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Lucide React, Shadcn UI (customized).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Create depth through layered design elements.
